stories.title: 便宜卖掉的那一天
stories.source_range: inspired by early pricing mistakes and seller-anxiety scenes

sentences.chinese: 那天市场里的人很多。
sentences.english_helper: That day, there are many people in the market.

sentences.chinese: 杂草本来觉得，今天应该比较容易卖。
sentences.english_helper: Weed originally thinks it should be easier to sell today.

sentences.chinese: 可是等了很久以后，他还是没有开张。
sentences.english_helper: But after waiting a long time, he still has not made a sale.

sentences.chinese: 这时候，一个年轻人停下来问价。
sentences.english_helper: At that moment, a young man stops and asks the price.

sentences.chinese: 杂草一听见对方开口，心里马上紧了一下。
sentences.english_helper: As soon as he hears the man speak, Weed's heart tightens at once.

sentences.chinese: 因为他太想卖掉今天的第一件东西。
sentences.english_helper: Because he wants very badly to sell the first piece of the day.

sentences.chinese: 所以他报了一个很便宜的价格。
sentences.english_helper: So he names a very cheap price.

sentences.chinese: 便宜到连他自己都愣了一下。
sentences.english_helper: Cheap enough that even he is startled for a moment.

sentences.chinese: 那个年轻人马上买了。
sentences.english_helper: The young man buys it right away.

sentences.chinese: 走得也很快。
sentences.english_helper: And leaves quickly too.

sentences.chinese: 一开始，杂草还告诉自己，这样也好。
sentences.english_helper: At first, Weed tells himself that this is fine.

sentences.chinese: 至少卖掉了。
sentences.english_helper: At least it sold.

sentences.chinese: 可是过了一会儿，他越想越不对。
sentences.english_helper: But after a while, the more he thinks about it, the more it feels wrong.

sentences.chinese: 那件东西他做了很久。
sentences.english_helper: He spent a long time making that piece.

sentences.chinese: 木头不是白来的。
sentences.english_helper: The wood did not come for free.

sentences.chinese: 时间也不是白来的。
sentences.english_helper: Time did not come for free either.

sentences.chinese: 连刀口磨掉的一点力气，也不是白来的。
sentences.english_helper: Even the effort worn away on the blade was not free.

sentences.chinese: 他忽然发现，自己刚才不是在让价。
sentences.english_helper: He suddenly realizes that he was not just lowering the price.

sentences.chinese: 自己刚才是在看轻自己的东西。
sentences.english_helper: He was undervaluing his own work.

sentences.chinese: 这让他心里很不舒服。
sentences.english_helper: That makes him feel very uncomfortable.

sentences.chinese: 后来，又有人来问别的作品。
sentences.english_helper: Later, someone else comes to ask about another piece.

sentences.chinese: 这一次，杂草没有急着开口。
sentences.english_helper: This time, Weed does not hurry to speak.

sentences.chinese: 他先在心里算了一下本钱。
sentences.english_helper: He first calculates the cost in his mind.

sentences.chinese: 又想了想自己花的时间。
sentences.english_helper: Then he thinks again about the time he spent.

sentences.chinese: 最后才说出价格。
sentences.english_helper: Only then does he state the price.

sentences.chinese: 那个人没有马上买。
sentences.english_helper: That person does not buy immediately.

sentences.chinese: 可是杂草这一次没有乱改。
sentences.english_helper: But this time, Weed does not change it impulsively.

sentences.chinese: 那个人后来还是走了。
sentences.english_helper: That person eventually still leaves.

sentences.chinese: 杂草心里当然还是有一点失望。
sentences.english_helper: Of course Weed still feels a little disappointed.

sentences.chinese: 可是这一次，他没有像刚才那样后悔。
sentences.english_helper: But this time, he does not regret it the way he did before.

sentences.chinese: 他终于明白，想把东西卖出去，不等于要先把自己放低。
sentences.english_helper: He finally understands that wanting to sell something does not mean putting yourself lower first.

stories.title: 看了很久的孩子
stories.source_range: inspired by small public reactions and unexpected viewers

new_words.gloss: to be willing to part with

sentences.chinese: 下午的时候，市场稍微安静了一点。
sentences.english_helper: In the afternoon, the market becomes a little quieter.

sentences.chinese: 杂草站在自己的东西旁边，没有说话。
sentences.english_helper: Weed stands beside his pieces without speaking.

sentences.chinese: 这时候，一个孩子走到他的摊前。
sentences.english_helper: At that moment, a child walks up to his stall.

sentences.chinese: 孩子没有马上问价。
sentences.english_helper: The child does not ask the price right away.

sentences.chinese: 也没有像大人那样只看一眼就走。
sentences.english_helper: And does not just glance once and leave like the adults do.

sentences.chinese: 孩子只是站在那里，看着一个小狗雕刻。
sentences.english_helper: The child simply stands there looking at a small dog carving.

sentences.chinese: 看了很久很久。
sentences.english_helper: And keeps looking for a very long time.

sentences.chinese: 杂草一开始有一点不明白。
sentences.english_helper: At first, Weed does not quite understand.

sentences.chinese: 后来他才发现，孩子不是随便看看。
sentences.english_helper: Later he realizes the child is not just browsing casually.

sentences.chinese: 孩子是真的喜欢。
sentences.english_helper: The child truly likes it.

sentences.chinese: 孩子甚至轻轻把手抬起来。
sentences.english_helper: The child even lifts a hand gently.

sentences.chinese: 可是又马上放下。
sentences.english_helper: But immediately lowers it again.

sentences.chinese: 好像怕碰坏。
sentences.english_helper: As if afraid of damaging it.

sentences.chinese: 杂草看见这个动作，心里忽然一动。
sentences.english_helper: Seeing that motion, something in Weed stirs suddenly.

sentences.chinese: 因为平常看他东西的人，很少这么小心。
sentences.english_helper: Because people who usually look at his work are rarely this careful.

sentences.chinese: 大部分人只会问值不值。
sentences.english_helper: Most people only ask whether it is worth the money.

sentences.chinese: 可是这个孩子先问的不是钱。
sentences.english_helper: But this child does not ask about money first.

sentences.chinese: 孩子先问：“它是不是很乖？”
sentences.english_helper: The child first asks, 'Is it very gentle?'

sentences.chinese: 杂草听了，先愣了一下。
sentences.english_helper: Weed is startled for a moment when he hears that.

sentences.chinese: 然后他说：“嗯，我做它的时候，是这么想的。”
sentences.english_helper: Then he says, 'Mm, that is what I was thinking when I made it.'

sentences.chinese: 孩子听了以后，眼睛更亮了。
sentences.english_helper: After hearing that, the child's eyes grow brighter.

sentences.chinese: 后来，一个大人走过来，把孩子叫走。
sentences.english_helper: Later, an adult walks over and calls the child away.

sentences.chinese: 他们最后没有买。
sentences.english_helper: In the end, they do not buy it.

sentences.chinese: 孩子走的时候，还一直回头看。
sentences.english_helper: As the child leaves, the child keeps looking back.

sentences.chinese: 杂草本来应该觉得可惜。
sentences.english_helper: Weed should have felt it was a pity.

sentences.chinese: 可是那一刻，他心里反而有一点暖。
sentences.english_helper: But at that moment, he instead feels a little warmth inside.

sentences.chinese: 因为他第一次发现，自己的东西可以让人停住那么久。
sentences.english_helper: Because for the first time he discovers that his work can make someone stop for that long.

sentences.chinese: 也可以让人舍不得碰。
sentences.english_helper: It can also make someone reluctant to touch it.

sentences.chinese: 那件小狗雕刻还是放在那里。
sentences.english_helper: That little dog carving is still sitting there.

sentences.chinese: 可是杂草再看它的时候，已经觉得它比刚才更珍贵了一点。
sentences.english_helper: But when Weed looks at it again, he already feels it is a little more precious than before.
